message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor "PackageManager" as PackageManager
actor "ApplicationPackageManager" as ApplicationPackageManager
actor "PackageManagerService" as PackageManagerService
actor "ActivityIntentResolver" as ActivityIntentResolver
actor "IntentResolver" as IntentResolver

PackageManager -> ApplicationPackageManager : queryIntentActivitiesAsUser
ApplicationPackageManager ..> PackageManagerService : queryIntentActivities
PackageManagerService ..> PackageManagerService : queryIntentActivitiesInternal
PackageManagerService -> ActivityIntentResolver : queryIntent
ActivityIntentResolver -> IntentResolver : queryIntent

@enduml
